name: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
description: The seventh major installment in the Resident Evil series, returning to the survival horror roots with a first-person perspective. Players control Ethan Winters as he searches for his missing wife in a derelict plantation inhabited by the twisted Baker family.

name: Resident Evil Village
description: The sequel to Resident Evil 7, continuing the story of Ethan Winters. Set a few years later, Ethan finds himself in a mysterious European village searching for his kidnapped daughter, facing a new family of lycanthropic beings and the towering Lady Dimitrescu.

name: Horizon Zero Dawn
description: An action role-playing game set in a post-apocalyptic world where tribal humans coexist with robotic creatures. Players control Aloy, a young outcast, as she embarks on a journey to discover her past and the secrets of the Old Ones.

name: Horizon Forbidden West
description: The sequel to Horizon Zero Dawn. Aloy travels to a forbidding stretch of the American coastline - the Forbidden West - to find the source of a mysterious plague that threatens all life. She must brave new territories, battle even more imposing machines, and encounter new tribes.

name: Call of Duty: Black Ops III
description: A futuristic first-person shooter set in 2065, where biomechanical augmentation is commonplace. The game features a complex campaign that can be played cooperatively, a deep Zombies mode, and competitive multiplayer with advanced movement systems like wall-running and thrust jumps.

name: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare
description: A reboot of the iconic Modern Warfare sub-series. The game features a gritty, realistic campaign tackling modern geopolitics and the moral ambiguity of modern warfare. It also introduced a new, highly popular Gunsmith system and the free-to-play battle royale, Warzone.

name: Grand Theft Auto V
description: An open-world action-adventure game set in the sprawling metropolis of Los Santos. The story follows three very different criminals as they plan and execute a series of daring heists. Its online component, GTA Online, continues to be a massive success.

name: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: A Western-themed action-adventure game and prequel to Red Dead Redemption. It follows outlaw Arthur Morgan, a member of the Van der Linde gang, as they rob, fight and flee across the heart of America against the encroaching forces of civilization and government agents.

name: Mortal Kombat X
description: A fighting game known for its brutal combat and Fatalities. The story continues years after the previous game, following the next generation of Earthrealm's warriors as they battle against the invading forces of Outworld. It introduced variations for each character, altering their fighting style.

name: FIFA 20
description: The 27th installment in the FIFA series. It introduced a new mode called 'VOLTA Football', focusing on street and small-sided football, alongside the traditional 11v11 simulation and the popular Ultimate Team mode.

name: Minecraft
description: A sandbox game where players can build, explore, and survive in a blocky, procedurally-generated 3D world. It offers multiple modes including Survival (gather resources, fight mobs) and Creative (unlimited resources for building).

name: Half-Life
description: A seminal first-person shooter that revolutionized the genre with its immersive storytelling and scripted sequences. Players take on the role of Dr. Gordon Freeman, a theoretical physicist who must fight his way out of a top-secret research facility after a catastrophic resonance cascade opens a portal to another dimension.

name: Half-Life 2
description: The long-awaited sequel set in a dystopian future where Earth is occupied by the Combine. Gordon Freeman is resurrected to lead a resistance movement. It introduced the revolutionary Source physics engine and iconic gameplay elements like the Gravity Gun.

name: Counter-Strike 1.6
description: The legendary standalone version of the original Counter-Strike mod, which became the definitive competitive first-person shooter for nearly a decade. It pitted a team of Terrorists against a team of Counter-Terrorists in objective-based rounds.

name: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive
description: The fourth game in the Counter-Strike series, refining the classic tactical gameplay with updated graphics, new maps, weapons, and game modes. It became a global esports phenomenon with a massive competitive scene and player base.

name: Elden Ring
description: An action RPG developed in a collaboration between FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin. Set in the vast, interconnected world of the Lands Between, players, as Tarnished, must traverse stunning landscapes, battle fearsome enemies, and ultimately become the Elden Lord.

name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
description: The fifth installment in the Elder Scrolls series, a high-fantasy open-world RPG. Players take on the role of the Dragonborn, a prophesied hero with the power of the Thu'um (dragon shout), and must save the province of Skyrim from the dragon Alduin the World-Eater.

name: Dark Souls III
description: The third main entry in the notoriously difficult Dark Souls series. Players must navigate a dark, crumbling world, battling grotesque monsters and challenging bosses. It features faster-paced combat than its predecessors and concludes the overarching story of the series.

name: Uncharted 4: A Thief's End
description: The fourth and final chapter in the story of treasure hunter Nathan Drake. Years after retiring from fortune hunting, Nathan is pulled back into the world of thieves by his long-lost brother, Samuel. Together, they set out to find Captain Henry Avery's legendary pirate treasure.

name: God of War Ragnarök
description: The sequel to the 2018 God of War. Set in the realm of Norse mythology, Kratos and his now-teenage son Atreus must navigate the impending apocalypse, Ragnarök, while facing the wrath of the vengeful god Freyr and other Asgardian forces.

name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: An open-world action RPG following Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter for hire, as he searches for his adopted daughter while navigating a war-torn world filled with political intrigue, mythical creatures, and moral ambiguity.

name: Cyberpunk 2077
description: An open-world RPG set in the dystopian Night City, where players control V, a mercenary outlaw searching for a unique implant that holds the key to immortality. Features deep character customization and branching narratives.

name: The Last of Us Part II
description: An action-adventure game set five years after the first game, following Ellie and Joel in post-apocalyptic Seattle. It explores themes of revenge, trauma, and the cycle of violence through its emotionally charged narrative.

name: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
description: An action-adventure game set in feudal Japan, following a shinobi on a mission to rescue his master and seek revenge. Features challenging combat centered around posture and parrying, with a unique resurrection mechanic.

name: Ghost of Tsushima
description: An open-world action-adventure set during the first Mongol invasion of Japan. Players control Jin Sakai, a samurai warrior who must adapt new tactics and become the legendary 'Ghost' to protect his island home.

name: Death Stranding
description: An action game from Hideo Kojima set in a post-apocalyptic world where players control Sam Porter Bridges, a courier tasked with reconnecting isolated cities and survivors to a network. Features unique social strand system gameplay.

name: Spider-Man: Miles Morales
description: An action-adventure game following Miles Morales as he develops his own Spider-Man powers and identity while protecting Harlem from a war between Roxxon Energy Corporation and the Underground crime syndicate.

name: Final Fantasy VII Remake
description: A reimagining of the classic JRPG, following Cloud Strife, a mercenary who joins an eco-terrorist group fighting against the Shinra corporation in the dystopian city of Midgar. Features real-time combat with strategic elements.

name: Persona 5 Royal
description: An enhanced version of Persona 5, a JRPG following a group of high school students who lead dual lives as Phantom Thieves, exploring dungeons and changing the hearts of corrupt individuals in Tokyo.

name: Doom Eternal
description: A fast-paced first-person shooter continuing the story of the Doom Slayer as he battles demonic forces across Earth and Hell. Features aggressive combat mechanics with a focus on resource management through glory kills and chainsaw attacks.

name: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
description: An action RPG set during the Viking invasion of England. Players control Eivor, a Viking raider who leads their clan from Norway to settle in the Anglo-Saxon kingdoms while clashing with the Assassins and Templars.

name: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
description: An action-adventure game set between Episode III and IV, following Padawan Cal Kestis as he survives Order 66 and rebuilds the Jedi Order while evading the Imperial Inquisition.

name: Control
description: A supernatural action-adventure game where Jesse Faden, the new Director of the Federal Bureau of Control, explores the shifting headquarters to find her missing brother and uncover paranormal secrets.

name: Hades
description: A rogue-like dungeon crawler where players control Zagreus, son of Hades, as he attempts to escape the Underworld to reach Mount Olympus. Features fast-paced combat and a rich narrative with Greek mythology characters.

name: Stray
description: A unique adventure game where players control a stray cat navigating a cybercity populated by robots. The cat must solve puzzles and uncover mysteries to find their way back to their family.

name: It Takes Two
description: A cooperative action-adventure game about a couple turned into dolls who must work together to navigate a fantastical world and repair their relationship. Designed exclusively for two-player co-op.

name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: A story-rich RPG based on Dungeons & Dragons, set in the Forgotten Realms. Players create a character and assemble a party to battle mind flayers and save the world, with deep tactical combat and branching narratives.

name: Hogwarts Legacy
description: An open-world action RPG set in the Wizarding World of Harry Potter in the 1800s. Players create their own character, attend Hogwarts, and uncover ancient secrets while mastering spells and brewing potions.

name: Returnal
description: A roguelike third-person shooter where Selene, a space pilot, crash-lands on a shape-shifting alien planet and finds herself trapped in a time loop. Features fast-paced combat and psychological horror elements.

name: Resident Evil 4 Remake
description: A modern remake of the classic survival horror game. Players control Leon S. Kennedy on a mission to rescue the President's daughter from a mysterious cult in rural Spain, featuring over-the-shoulder combat and tense horror sequences.

name: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain
description: An open-world stealth game following Punished 'Venom' Snake in 1980s Afghanistan and Africa as he builds a private army and seeks revenge on those who destroyed his base. Features unparalleled freedom in approach to missions.

name: Bloodborne
description: An action RPG set in the gothic city of Yharnam, plagued by a blood-borne disease. Players hunt beasts and uncover cosmic horrors in a challenging, atmospheric world with aggressive combat and Lovecraftian themes.

name: Fallout 4
description: An open-world post-apocalyptic RPG set in Boston. Players emerge from Vault 111 as the Sole Survivor, searching for their kidnapped son while navigating the dangers of the Commonwealth wasteland.

name: Overwatch
description: A team-based multiplayer first-person shooter featuring diverse heroes with unique abilities. Players compete in objective-based game modes across various maps in a vibrant, optimistic future.

name: Battlefield 1
description: A first-person shooter set during World War I, featuring large-scale multiplayer battles with vehicles, destruction, and operations game mode. The campaign tells personal stories from different perspectives of the war.

name: Titanfall 2
description: A first-person shooter featuring a unique bond between pilot and Titan. The acclaimed campaign follows Rifleman Jack Cooper as he bonds with Titan BT-7274, while multiplayer combines pilot mobility with Titan combat.

name: Nier: Automata
description: An action RPG set in a post-apocalyptic world where androids 2B, 9S, and A2 battle machine lifeforms. Features deep philosophical themes, multiple endings, and a blend of gameplay genres from bullet hell to hack-and-slash.

name: Persona 5
description: The original version of Persona 5, a stylish JRPG following the Phantom Thieves as they change the hearts of corrupt individuals in Tokyo. Features turn-based combat, social simulation, and time management mechanics.

name: What Remains of Edith Finch
description: A narrative exploration game where players explore the Finch family home and experience the stories of each family member's death through unique, imaginative vignettes blending multiple gameplay styles.

name: Cuphead
description: A run-and-gun game with 1930s cartoon aesthetics. Players battle through challenging boss fights and run-and-gun levels as Cuphead and Mugman, who must repay their debt to the devil.

name: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
description: A dark fantasy action-adventure following Senua, a Celtic warrior experiencing psychosis, as she journeys into Helheim to save the soul of her dead lover. Features binaural audio and represents mental illness authentically.

name: Dragon Ball FighterZ
description: A 2.5D fighting game featuring the Dragon Ball roster with stunning anime visuals. Teams of three fighters battle in fast-paced, accessible yet deep combat that captures the series' iconic energy.

name: Monster Hunter: World
description: An action RPG where players hunt massive monsters in lush ecosystems. Hunters track, fight, and carve monsters to craft better gear, with seamless multiplayer and regular post-launch updates.

name: A Way Out
description: A cooperative action-adventure game following Leo and Vincent, two prisoners who must work together to escape and evade capture. Designed exclusively for split-screen co-op, with unique shared narrative.

name: Detroit: Become Human
description: An interactive drama set in a futuristic Detroit where androids gain consciousness. Players control three androids whose stories intersect based on player choices, leading to numerous branching narratives and endings.

name: Marvel's Spider-Man
description: An open-world action game following an experienced Peter Parker as he battles classic villains like Mister Negative and the Sinister Six while balancing his personal life. Features web-swinging traversal and fluid combat.

name: Forza Horizon 4
description: An open-world racing game set in a fictionalized Britain with dynamic seasons that change gameplay. Players race, stunt, and explore in hundreds of cars across diverse terrain and weather conditions.

name: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate
description: A crossover fighting game featuring Nintendo's biggest characters alongside third-party icons. With over 80 fighters, players battle in chaotic platform fighting with the tagline 'Everyone is Here!'

name: Resident Evil 2 Remake
description: A modern remake of the 1998 survival horror classic. Players control Leon Kennedy and Claire Redfield navigating Raccoon City during the zombie outbreak, featuring over-the-shoulder camera and modernized gameplay.

name: Kingdom Hearts III
description: The long-awaited conclusion to the Dark Seeker saga, following Sora, Donald, and Goofy as they travel through Disney worlds to save their friends from Organization XIII. Features expanded combat and attractions.
